tasks.subject: Task 0: DB migration + schema types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add invite_token_hash + invite_token_expires_at columns to erp_users and update Drizzle schema + Zod enums.

**Files:**
- Create: `migrations/0022_t09_email_invite.sql`
- Modify: `migrations/meta/_journal.json`
- Modify: `shared/schema.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit passes
- [ ] userStatusEnum includes "PENDING_INVITE"
- [ ] users Drizzle table has inviteTokenHash and inviteTokenExpiresAt fields
- [ ] auditActionEnum includes "INVITE_ACCEPTED" and "INVITE_RESENT"

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["migrations/0022_t09_email_invite.sql", "migrations/meta/_journal.json", "shared/schema.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["userStatusEnum includes PENDING_INVITE", "users table has inviteTokenHash + inviteTokenExpiresAt", "auditActionEnum includes INVITE_ACCEPTED and INVITE_RESENT"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Token generator + Resend email module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add generateInviteToken() to password.ts and create the Resend email wrapper.

**Files:**
- Modify: `server/auth/password.ts`
- Create: `server/email/resend.ts`
- Modify: `package.json` (add resend)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] generateInviteToken() returns 64-char hex string
- [ ] sendInviteEmail constructs hash-fragment URL with ?token= and ?email=
- [ ] sendInviteEmail throws if RESEND_API_KEY unset
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit passes

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/auth/password.ts", "server/email/resend.ts", "package.json"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generateInviteToken returns 64-char hex", "sendInviteEmail builds hash-fragment URL", "throws if RESEND_API_KEY missing"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Storage layer extensions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend CreateUserInput to carry invite fields; add acceptInvite + renewInviteToken to storage interface and implementation.

**Files:**
- Modify: `server/storage.ts`
- Modify: `server/db-storage.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CreateUserInput accepts status, inviteTokenHash, inviteTokenExpiresAt
- [ ] createUser passes those fields to the DB insert
- [ ] acceptInvite sets passwordHash + passwordChangedAt=now + status=ACTIVE + clears token columns
- [ ] renewInviteToken overwrites the two token columns
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit passes

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/storage.ts", "server/db-storage.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CreateUserInput has status + invite fields", "acceptInvite clears token columns and sets ACTIVE", "renewInviteToken overwrites token columns"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Server routes + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire up all route changes and ship integration tests for the full invite lifecycle.

**Files:**
- Modify: `server/routes.ts`
- Modify: `server/auth/auth-routes.ts`
- Modify: `server/__tests__/users.test.ts`
- Create: `server/__tests__/t09-invite.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] POST /api/users returns { user } with status=PENDING_INVITE, no temporaryPassword
- [ ] POST /api/auth/login with PENDING_INVITE user returns 401 INVITE_PENDING
- [ ] POST /api/auth/accept-invite with valid token → 200, status=ACTIVE
- [ ] POST /api/auth/accept-invite with expired/wrong token → 400 INVITE_INVALID
- [ ] POST /api/users/:id/resend-invite → 204, new token written
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL pnpm test` → all suites pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/routes.ts", "server/auth/auth-routes.ts", "server/__tests__/users.test.ts", "server/__tests__/t09-invite.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL pnpm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /api/users returns PENDING_INVITE status", "PENDING_INVITE login blocked with INVITE_PENDING", "accept-invite lifecycle works", "resend-invite works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Client pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add public /set-password page, register it as a public route, and update settings-users to use the invite UX.

**Files:**
- Create: `client/src/pages/set-password.tsx`
- Modify: `client/src/App.tsx`
- Modify: `client/src/pages/settings-users.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] /set-password reachable without auth (outside AuthGate)
- [ ] Wrong/expired token shows error; no retry loop
- [ ] Valid token sets password and redirects to /login
- [ ] Settings Users: no temp-password dialog
- [ ] PENDING_INVITE users show amber Pending badge
- [ ] PENDING_INVITE users show Resend invite button; Disable hidden
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit passes

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/set-password.tsx", "client/src/App.tsx", "client/src/pages/settings-users.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/set-password is public route", "valid token flow works", "settings-users shows PENDING badge and resend button"]}
```
